_comment: Single source of truth for gallery photos. Run scripts/sync-pictures.py after adding/removing entries here to regenerate pictures.html and index.html photo strip. Set 'featured': true on up to 3 entries to show them in the homepage 'From the Field' strip.

photos.title: Dragoon Mountains Vista
photos.short: The south pasture and mountains — Cochise County, Arizona.
photos.full: The Dragoon Mountains from the south pasture — the place that gives the guides their name.

photos.title: Two-Tier Bucket Rack
photos.short: Covered patio build — two levels of bato buckets with overhead LED rails and potted citrus behind.
photos.full: Two-tier bato bucket rack on the covered patio — seedlings on both levels with overhead LED rails and potted citrus behind.

photos.title: Bato Bucket Array
photos.short: Dual-row Dutch bucket setup — perlite/coco media, drip feed, gravity return.
photos.full: Dual-row bato bucket array on the stone patio with hanging LED rail — perlite/coco media, drip feed, gravity return.

photos.title: Media-Filled & Ready
photos.short: Perlite-packed buckets awaiting transplant — LED rail in position, feed lines run.
photos.full: Freshly media-filled bato buckets ready for transplant — view down the aisle under the hanging LED rail.

photos.title: Early Pepper Seedlings
photos.short: Single-row patio build just after transplant — reservoir at the foot, drippers dialed in.
photos.full: Pepper seedlings just after transplant into the single-row patio build — reservoir visible at the foot of the row.

photos.title: Tomato Block
photos.short: Young indeterminates on drip feed — ready for stake-and-string training.
photos.full: Young indeterminate tomatoes in bato buckets — irrigation lines run, ready to stake and string up.

photos.title: NFT Lettuce Tower
photos.short: Mature romaine on the nutrient-film tower — open channels ready for the next succession.
photos.full: Mature romaine heads on the NFT (nutrient-film) tower with the remaining channels ready for the next succession.

photos.title: Outdoor Herb Wintering Shelter
photos.short: Rosemary, mint, and thyme wintered behind a frost wrap against a sun-warmed wall.
photos.full: Outdoor herb shelter — rosemary, mint, and thyme potted on a bench against a stucco wall, behind a clear frost wrap that traps the wall's stored heat for a frost-free microclimate through the coldest January nights.

photos.title: Potted Citrus
photos.short: Lemon & lime trees in large containers — supplemental LED for winter production.
photos.full: Potted citrus block — Meyer lemon, Persian lime and kaffir lime in large containers under overhead grow lights.

photos.title: Tomatoes in Bato Buckets
photos.short: Three indeterminate tomatoes climbing in bato buckets — ready for stake-and-string training.
photos.full: Indeterminate tomatoes in bato buckets on the covered patio — irrigation lines run, plants reaching the trellis-ready stage.

photos.title: Citrus in Bloom
photos.short: Lemon and lime in flower — full sun, drip-irrigated containers on the patio.
photos.full: Patio citrus block — Meyer lemon and Persian lime in large containers, both in bloom, drip-irrigated against the south wall.

photos.title: Full Pepper Production
photos.short: Multi-row bato bucket array with mature pepper plants under hanging LED rails — the system in production.
photos.full: Full-production bato bucket array — multi-row pepper crop under the overhead LED rails, with the reservoir visible at the front corner.
